content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Heirtotheempire.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' first published in June 1991.]]

A list of events in '''1991''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 30|30]] – [[Dominik Mayer]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)]]'' is published by [[West End Games]].

==February==
*[[February 17|17]] – [[Ed Sheeran]] is born.
*[[February 26|26]] – [[Max Lloyd Jones]] is born.

==March==
*[[March 4|04]] – [[Pip Andersen]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – [[Heir to the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Heir to the Empire'' abridged audiobook]] released on cassette.
*[[June 3|03]] – [[Vince Colletta]] dies.
*?? – [[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']] published.
*?? – ''[[Domain of Evil]]'' published.

==August==
*[[August 22|22]] – [[Madison Lloyd]] is born.
*[[August 31|31]] – [[Mimi Ndiweni]] is born.

==September==
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Kit]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 2|02]] – [[Antony Del Rio]] is born.
*[[October 27|27]] – [[Charlotte Louise]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Rick Cimino]] died.
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1991 video game)|''Star Wars'' (1991 video game)]] released for the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Entertainment System|Nintendo Entertainment System]].
*[[November 21|21]] – [[Megan Ilnitzki]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Dark Empire 1|''Dark Empire'' 1]] published.
*[[December 22|22]] – [[Morgan Upton]] dies.
*[[December 29|29]] – [[Brian Vernel]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'' published.

==Unknown==
*– ''[[Death Star Technical Companion]]'' published.
*– ''[[Graveyard of Alderaan]]'' published.
*– [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 14|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 14]] published in Summer.

----
{{Years-RealWorld}}

}}
